title: psacalium amplifolium
intro: Psacalium amplifolium, also known as tree marigold, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Psacalium amplifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a popular remedy for skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of Psacalium amplifolium can be made into salves, creams, or teas to harness its medicinal properties.
